status_detail: 40 MW pressurized alkaline electrolysis plant in Joensuu, Finland, for e-methanol production. Developed by P2X Solutions. Environmental permit legally binding January 2026. Sunfire technology selected. FEED study underway. Operations target ~2029.

data_management.narrative_summary: P2X Solutions' Joensuu project is a 40 MW pressurized alkaline electrolysis plant planned in Joensuu, Finland. Following the successful commissioning of the 20 MW Harjavalta plant (GA-PR-052), this project is the next step in P2X Solutions' strategy to reach 1 GW of green hydrogen capacity. The plant will produce green hydrogen for e-methanol synthesis using captured CO2, targeting the shipping fuel market. Sunfire has been selected to supply the pressurized alkaline electrolyzer technology. The environmental permit was approved and became legally binding in January 2026. Operations are targeted for approximately 2029.

power.grid_connection_detail: Grid-connected with Finnish renewable energy PPAs

sources.title: P2X Solutions 40 MW Joensuu e-methanol project — permit approved 2026
sources.author: P2X Solutions / Sunfire / FuelCellChina
